author: FireAndRescueAcademy
description: Synchronizes MissionChief alliance chat with a Discord channel.
install_msg: ChatManager installed. It synchronizes MissionChief alliance chat with the configured Discord channel. Default channel: 1518029674570055720. Configure with `[p]chatmanager`.
name: ChatManager
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores channel settings, the last synchronized MissionChief chat ID, and short-lived outgoing echo suppression data. It relays chat messages between MissionChief and Discord.
